items.title: Quoting Sam Altman
items.title_zh: 阿尔特曼泄露邮件揭示OpenAI开源策略
items.title_en: Leaked Altman email reveals OpenAI's open-source strategy
items.summary: A leaked email reveals Sam Altman's plan to release a locally-run GPT-3-capable model to preempt competitors and hinder new AI efforts.

items.title: Hugging Face 披露 AI 智能体攻击事件，商业大模型拒绝协助取证
items.title_zh: Hugging Face披露AI智能体攻击，商业大模型拒绝取证
items.title_en: Hugging Face Discloses AI Agent Attack, Commercial LLM Refuses Forensics
items.summary: Hugging Face披露了一起由AI智能体驱动的攻击事件，攻击者利用数据集处理流程漏洞入侵系统，商业大模型拒绝协助取证，公司已修复并建议用户轮换凭证。

items.title: 因 Kimi K3 模型表现强劲，特朗普政府被曝酝酿限制美国企业使用相对物美价廉的中国开放权重模型
items.title_zh: 特朗普政府因Kimi K3拟限制中国开源AI模型
items.title_en: US May Restrict Chinese Open-Weight AI Models After Kimi K3
items.summary: Trump administration reportedly considers restricting US companies' use of Chinese open-source AI models due to Kimi K3's strong performance, with AI advisor David Sacks criticizing OpenAI and Anthropic for lobbying against open-source competition.

items.title: Fastjson 1.x 被曝无 gadget 高危 RCE 漏洞
items.title_zh: Fastjson 1.x 曝无 gadget 高危 RCE 漏洞
items.title_en: Critical RCE in Fastjson 1.x Without Gadgets or AutoType
items.summary: Critical RCE vulnerability discovered in Fastjson 1.x versions 1.2.68-1.2.83 without requiring gadgets or autoType, affecting JDK 8/17/21, with no official patch expected.

items.title: Reverse-engineering is cheap now
items.title_zh: 编码代理让家庭设备逆向工程成本变得低廉
items.title_en: Coding agents make reverse-engineering home devices cheap
items.summary: The reduced cost of code via agents makes reverse-engineering home devices more practical, lowering effort and maintenance concerns.

items.title: Who’s Afraid of Chinese Models?
items.title_zh: 美提案：训练数据为合理使用，全面禁止反蒸馏条款
items.title_en: US Law Proposed to Legalize Training Data and Ban Anti-Distillation
items.summary: Ben Thompson proposes US law to legalize training data as fair use and prohibit anti-distillation terms of service to level the playing field with Chinese AI models.

items.title: 美军常用 App 被指嵌入中俄代码 引发国家安全担忧
items.title_zh: 美军应用被发现嵌入中俄代码
items.title_en: US Military Apps Found Embedded with Chinese, Russian Code
items.summary: Research finds that nearly two-thirds of apps marketed to US military personnel embed third-party code from China and Russia, raising national security concerns.

items.title: 智谱建成全国产芯片大型数据中心
items.title_zh: 智谱建成全国产芯片大型数据中心
items.title_en: Zhipu AI Builds Giant Data Center Using Only Domestic Chips
items.summary: Zhipu AI completes a 1 GW data center using only domestic chips for training its GLM model, marking a major step in Chinese AI infrastructure self-reliance.
